docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF IRMA BONDOC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REYNALDO RAMOS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-24-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, REYNALDO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY BONDOC, IRMA AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, REYNALDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONDOC, IRMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMOS, REYNALDO $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
